sample_requests: Fit Monocle2 on the Olsson WT subset, plot the DDRTree trajectory by State, run differential_gene_test on the ordering subset
Run BEAM at branch point 1 and visualise the top-4 branch-dependent genes with compare_groups=True and shared_trunk=True
Build a 40-gene dynamic_heatmap of top pseudotime-significant genes ordered by peak, GAM-fitted
Show per-gene trends for Gfi1 / Irf8 / Elane along Pseudotime with cell points coloured by State
Compare multiple marker genes on the same axis with compare_features=True

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/single/_monocle*.py and omicverse/single/dynamic_features.py. Olsson WT cohort (~5k cells) serves as future smoke target; no live smoke run executed.
